headline: Waste Management Bonus Highlights Healthcare Integration And Long Term Investment Case
summary: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) awarded a $1 million bonus to former CFO Devina Rankin in recognition of her role in integrating the Healthcare Solutions business after the Stericycle acquisition. The payment also acknowledges her leadership through a major transition period as she moves out of her executive role. For investors tracking NYSE:WM, this recognition underscores how important the Stericycle Healthcare Solutions integration is to the broader story at Waste Management. The company’s...
